test.summary: 200 tests passed, 0 failed, 450 expect() calls across 20 files

lint.command: printf 'No dedicated lint command is configured for this repository.\n'

nonBlockingIssues.description: App-level tests directly import CreateWorktreeDialog rather than testing through App integration. Could benefit from full App-level integration tests simulating Ctrl+N -> type -> Enter flow.
Test cleanup code silently ignores errors in try/catch blocks. Could mask real problems during test development.
Real git worktree tests create actual repositories in temp directories. Tests may be slow on some systems or leave artifacts if interrupted.
